data.name: ErrorItemNotFound
data.value: No item found. Local cache is still available.

data.name: pos.status.noLocalMatch
data.value: No local item found. Checkout can continue offline.

data.name: pos.status.multipleMatches
data.value: Found {0} items. Select one to add.

data.name: cart.status.zeroPriceItem
data.value: Cart contains a zero-price item. Update the price before checkout.

data.name: cart.status.quantityMustBeInteger
data.value: Item quantity must be a positive integer.

data.name: pos.status.discountAmountTooHigh
data.value: Discount amount cannot exceed the current total.

data.name: pos.status.discountPercentOutOfRange
data.value: Discount percent must be between 0 and 100.

data.name: payment.status.nonCashAlreadyCoversOrder
data.value: Non-cash payments already cover this order.

data.name: payment.voucher.refundAmountMustBePositive
data.value: Voucher refund amount must be greater than zero.

data.name: payment.voucher.refundOrderReferenceRequired
data.value: Voucher refund order reference is required.

data.name: payment.voucher.refundIdempotencyKeyRequired
data.value: Voucher refund idempotency key is required.

data.name: payment.card.amountMustBePositive
data.value: Card amount must be greater than zero.

data.name: payment.card.linklyUnavailable
data.value: ANZ Linkly terminal adapter is unavailable.

data.name: payment.card.squareMissingCheckoutId
data.value: Square checkout did not return an id.

data.name: payment.card.squareAmountMismatch
data.value: Square authorized amount did not match the requested amount.

data.name: payment.card.squareInvalidResponse
data.value: Square terminal returned an invalid response.

data.name: payment.card.squareRefundMissingReference
data.value: Square refund requires an original Square payment reference.

data.name: success.subtitle
data.value: The transaction has been processed successfully.

data.name: receipt.drawer.openFailed
data.value: Cash drawer could not be opened.

data.name: receipt.printer.portOpenFailed
data.value: Printer port could not be opened.

data.name: receipt.printer.lineSpacingFailed
data.value: Printer line spacing could not be set.

data.name: receipt.printer.barcodeFailed
data.value: Printer barcode could not be printed.

data.name: receipt.printer.qrCodeFailed
data.value: Printer QR code could not be printed.

data.name: receipt.printer.textFailed
data.value: Printer text could not be printed.

data.name: receipt.printer.cutPaperFailed
data.value: Printer paper could not be cut.

data.name: receipt.printer.statusReadFailed
data.value: Printer status could not be read.

data.name: customer.promotionBody
data.value: Fresh market selection this weekend and member-only savings.

data.name: customerDisplay.window.opened
data.value: Customer display opened on the second display.

data.name: customerDisplay.window.openedNormal
data.value: Customer display opened in a normal window on the second display.

data.name: customerDisplay.window.openedFullscreen
data.value: Customer display opened full screen on the second display.

data.name: customerDisplay.window.noSecondDisplay
data.value: No second display detected. Customer display was not opened.

data.name: shell.sync.retryCompleted
data.value: Order upload retry completed: {0} succeeded, {1} failed.

data.name: shell.sync.caption
data.value: Shows failed, pending, and syncing order uploads.

data.name: success.syncQueued
data.value: Order saved locally and queued for upload.

data.name: specialProducts.empty
data.value: No special products cached for this store.

data.name: specialProducts.status.loaded
data.value: Loaded {0} special products from local cache.

data.name: specialProducts.status.searchResults
data.value: Found {0} products that can be marked special.

data.name: specialProducts.status.onlineRequired
data.value: Go online to add or remove special product marks.

data.name: specialProducts.status.scanRequiresEdit
data.value: Open edit mode before scanning special products.

data.name: specialProducts.status.scanConfirm
data.value: Found {0}. Confirm to mark it as special.

data.name: specialProducts.status.downloadCompleted
data.value: Downloaded {0} special item lookups and unmarked {1} local products.

data.name: returns.searchHint
data.value: Scan order number, or scan product when no-receipt return is on

data.name: returns.staleWarning
data.value: Return records may be stale while using local fallback.

data.name: payment.cash.status.returnCheckoutNotReady
data.value: Refund checkout is not implemented yet. Remove return lines or use the refund payment page later.

data.name: payment.zeroSettlement.noTenders
data.value: No payment is required for this order.

data.name: payment.status.ready
data.value: Add payment tenders until the order is fully paid.

data.name: payment.refund.status.ready
data.value: Add refund tenders until the refund is fully covered.

data.name: payment.zeroSettlement.status.ready
data.value: This order balances to zero. Complete the order without adding a tender.

data.name: payment.status.alreadyFullyPaid
data.value: The order is already fully paid.

data.name: payment.status.removeTendersBeforeBack
data.value: Remove added tenders or complete the payment before returning to POS.

data.name: payment.status.cardExceedsRemaining
data.value: Card tender cannot exceed the remaining amount.

data.name: payment.status.voucherExceedsRemaining
data.value: Voucher tender cannot exceed the remaining amount.

data.name: payment.status.unsupportedMethod
data.value: This payment method is not supported.

data.name: payment.status.noTendersAdded
data.value: Add at least one tender before completing payment.

data.name: payment.status.remainingBalance
data.value: The order must be fully paid before completion.

data.name: payment.refund.status.noTendersAdded
data.value: Add at least one refund tender before completing the refund.

data.name: payment.refund.status.remainingBalance
data.value: The refund must be fully covered before completion.

data.name: payment.status.duplicateVoucher
data.value: This voucher has already been added.

data.name: payment.status.voucherCodeRequired
data.value: Enter a voucher code before adding voucher payment.

data.name: payment.status.duplicatePaymentMethod
data.value: This payment method has already been added.

data.name: payment.status.retryVoucherUpload
data.value: Retry the voucher order upload before changing tenders.

data.name: payment.status.uploadFailed
data.value: Voucher order upload failed. Press Complete Payment to retry.

data.name: deviceRegistration.reregister.subtitle
data.value: Select the store to switch this device registration to.

data.name: deviceRegistration.status.missingAuthorization
data.value: Device is active but missing authorization details. Please contact support.

data.name: deviceRegistration.status.selectStore
data.value: Select a store and submit this register for approval.

data.name: deviceRegistration.status.noReregisterStores
data.value: No other stores are available for device reregistration.

data.name: deviceRegistration.status.selectReregisterStore
data.value: Select a new store and submit device reregistration.

data.name: deviceRegistration.status.switchStore
data.value: Select a new store to switch this pending registration.

data.name: returns.status.default
data.value: Scan order number to start a receipt return.

data.name: returns.status.noReceiptMode
data.value: No-receipt return enabled. Scan a product to add it.

data.name: returns.status.receiptMode
data.value: Receipt return mode enabled. Scan an order number.

data.name: returns.status.lookupPrompt
data.value: Scan order number to start a receipt return.

data.name: returns.status.loadedOnline
data.value: Loaded order {0} from online order history.

data.name: returns.status.loadedLocalStaleWithError
data.value: Loaded local order {0}; online lookup failed. {1}

data.name: returns.status.scanProduct
data.value: Scan a product code to add a no-receipt return line.

data.name: returns.status.productNotFound
data.value: Product {0} was not found in the local catalog.

data.name: returns.status.loadedLocalStale
data.value: Loaded local order {0}; online order history is not available.

data.name: main.catalogSync.timedOut
data.value: Catalog sync timed out. Using the local catalog for now.

data.name: main.reregister.previewUnsupported
data.value: Device reregistration is unavailable in preview mode.

data.name: main.reregister.cartNotEmpty
data.value: Clear the current cart before changing store registration.

data.name: main.reregister.syncPending
data.value: Complete pending order sync before changing store registration.

data.name: main.reregister.submitted
data.value: Store switch submitted. Re-register this device to continue.

data.name: main.suspendedUnavailable
data.value: Suspended order service is not available.

data.name: main.scannerBindingReset
data.value: Scanner binding reset. Trigger the scanner again to bind the current device.

data.name: settings.linklyCloud.vendorIdMissing
data.value: Linkly POS vendor id is not configured.

data.name: settings.linklyCloud.vendorIdInvalid
data.value: Linkly POS vendor id must be a UUID v4.

data.name: dailyClose.status.ready
data.value: Ready to review daily close totals.

data.name: dailyClose.status.savedPrinted
data.value: Daily close saved and receipt printed.

data.name: dailyClose.status.savedPrintFailed
data.value: Daily close saved, but printing failed: {0}

data.name: dailyClose.status.historyEmpty
data.value: No daily close history found for the selected date.

data.name: linkly.local.amountMustBePositive
data.value: Card amount must be greater than zero.

data.name: linkly.local.requestSendFailed
data.value: ANZ Linkly transaction request could not be sent.

data.name: linkly.local.cancelOutcomeUnknown
data.value: ANZ Linkly cancellation outcome could not be confirmed.

data.name: linkly.local.emptyResponse
data.value: ANZ Linkly returned an empty response.

data.name: linkly.cloud.pairingInvalid
data.value: Linkly Cloud pairing is invalid. Pair the terminal again.

data.name: linkly.cloud.refundMissingReference
data.value: Linkly Cloud refund requires an original RFN reference.

data.name: linkly.cloud.amountMustBePositive
data.value: Card amount must be greater than zero.

data.name: linkly.cloud.notPaired
data.value: Linkly Cloud terminal is not paired.

data.name: linkly.cloud.vendorIdMissing
data.value: Linkly POS vendor id is not configured.

data.name: linkly.cloud.notSubmitted
data.value: Linkly Cloud transaction was not submitted. Retry the payment.

data.name: linkly.cloud.invalidResponse
data.value: Linkly Cloud returned an invalid response.

data.name: linkly.cloud.declined
data.value: ANZ Linkly Cloud transaction was declined.
